pom.xml.general_idea: Change the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 APIs, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 language features and potentially causing runtime issues if Java 21-specific APIs are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release configuration in the maven-compiler-plugin to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin configuration explicitly targets Java 21, overriding or reinforcing the property setting for correct compilation.
